## Registry Checklist

- [ ] Add content type to `docs/assets/style-registry.js`.
- [ ] Add compatibility scores for every style model.
- [ ] Add page-to-content-type mapping if a page uses it.
- [ ] Add sample content or page preview when needed.
- [ ] Verify Style Atlas matrix and judgment strip render it.
